title: rubus trichomorus
intro: Rubus trichomorus, also known as the bristly raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its high levels of salicylic acid. The health benefits of Rubus trichomorus include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use as a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Rubus trichomorus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
